product_overview: A web app that helps fitness trainers manage clients, create and track training schedules, log session results, and present progress reports. (This PRD references the original specification on PRD page 1 which describes trainer and trainee roles, calendar-based scheduling, session summaries, and progress graphs.)
core_goals: Replace manual paper records with a centralized, internet-accessible system for trainers and trainees.
Enable trainers to create, edit, and manage personalized training plans and client data at scale.
Provide session-level logging (sets, reps, weight, RPE) and daily session summary cards for client motivation and sharing.
Display client progress through easy-to-understand charts and reports to support continuous plan adjustments.
Support quick feedback and notes per session and a clear calendar view of past/upcoming sessions.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Email/password signup and login plus Google SSO; issue and handle auth tokens and redirect to appropriate route on success or failure.
user_flows: /login -> Enter email and password -> Click Login button -> Handle auth tokens -> See dashboard at /dashboard
/login -> Click Sign in with Google -> Authenticate with Google OAuth popup -> Handle auth tokens -> See dashboard at /dashboard
/signup -> Fill signup fields (name, email, password) -> Click Signup button -> Handle auth tokens -> See dashboard at /dashboard
/login -> Enter email and password -> Click Login button -> Receive invalid credentials error -> See inline error message and stay on /login
/signup -> Fill incomplete signup fields -> Click Signup button -> Receive validation errors -> See highlighted fields on /signup

features.name: Dashboard Schedule
features.description: Calendar-style schedule and tabbed view (Today, Upcoming, Past) that shows session cards; trainers and trainees can open session details from schedule cards.
user_flows: /dashboard -> Switch tabs (Today, Upcoming, Past) -> View schedule cards -> Open session details -> See session detail modal with exercises and time
/dashboard -> Switch to Today tab -> View schedule cards -> Click a schedule card -> Open session details -> Click Close -> Return to /dashboard
/dashboard -> Attempt to access while unauthenticated -> See redirect to /login -> See authorization required message
/dashboard -> View schedule cards -> Schedule API request fails -> See loading spinner then fetch error -> See Retry button on /dashboard

features.name: Session Logging
features.description: Log exercise sets (reps, weight, RPE) inside a session modal; expand exercises and toggle completion per set; changes persisted to server.
user_flows: /dashboard -> Click on session to open modal -> Expand exercise details -> Input reps, weight, RPE -> Toggle completion status -> Click Save -> See updated set values in the session modal
/dashboard -> Click on session to open modal -> Expand exercise details -> Input reps, weight, RPE -> Click Save -> Server returns success -> See updated values reflected on /dashboard schedule card

/dashboard -> Click on session to open modal -> Expand exercise details -> Input invalid reps value (text) -> Click Save -> See validation error next to reps field -> Correct value and click Save -> See updated set saved
/dashboard -> Click on session to open modal -> Input reps, weight, RPE -> Click Save -> Server API returns error -> See save failure message and Retry option in modal

features.name: Client Management
features.description: Trainers can add, edit, and remove client profiles and view per-client appointment lists and basic details (personal info, contact, notes).
user_flows: /dashboard -> Navigate to Clients panel -> Click Add Client -> Fill client details -> Click Save -> See new client listed in Clients panel
/dashboard -> Navigate to Clients panel -> Click a client -> Open client detail summary -> See list of scheduled sessions and basic stats
/dashboard -> Click Add Client -> Fill duplicate or missing required fields -> Click Save -> See validation error and blocked save -> Correct fields and Save -> See client added
/dashboard -> Select a client -> Click Delete -> Confirm deletion -> Receive deletion error from server -> See error message and client remains listed

features.name: Reports, Session Summary Card & Notes
features.description: View visual progress reports (graphs) and autogenerated daily Session Summary Cards; trainers can write post-session notes/feedback and share summary images with clients.
user_flows: /dashboard -> Open client profile -> View progress graph -> Hover data point -> See metric detail tooltip
/dashboard -> Open a past session -> See autogenerated Session Summary Card image -> Click Download or Share -> Send summary to client
/dashboard -> Open session details -> Enter post-session notes/feedback -> Click Save Notes -> See notes appear in session history
/dashboard -> Open client profile -> No historical data present -> See empty-state message and guidance to add sessions -> Click Create Session to start logging

routes.description: Root route, redirects to Login or Dashboard based on auth
Main dashboard overview with schedule and progress

features.name: Dashboard Schedule
features.description: View daily, upcoming, and past schedules

features.name: Session Logging
user_interactions: Click on session to open modal
